title: 有馬記念の後に・限界の果て

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon has surpassed her body's limit,
fulfilling her grand dream of reaching her full
potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a while, she's flooded with emotion, but upon
realizing she's achieved her goal, she bursts into
laughter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While racing, Manhattan Cafe saw in Agnes
Tachyon the shadow of the person whom she's
been chasing. This further piques Tachyon's
interest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to have found a new test subject. A
deviant grin spreads across her face as her mind
plunges into a sea of wild ideas.
